parameters-en.Filter: Applies a high cut (or low pass) filter to the signal, letting you remove treble frequencies. At 0.0, no filter is applied.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
parameters-en.Clipping: Chooses the type of clipping circuit. Choose Op-amp, Asymmetrical, or Symmetrical.
parameters-en.Octave: Blends in a signal one octave up. At 0.0, no octave signal is heard. Works best when playing single notes.
